recommendations: Use faker with fixed seed (faker.seed(12345)) for all unique test data
Replace waitForTimeout(1500) with conditional waits (expect().toBeVisible() or waitForResponse)
Consider using test data factories with deterministic sequences instead of timestamps
Use data.factories.ts from test-support with deterministic data generation
summary: Tests have 5 HIGH severity violations (Date.now() for unique emails) and 2 MEDIUM violations (hard waits). Email uniqueness can be achieved deterministically using faker with fixed seeds or sequential counters.
